summary.en: Ping An Good Doctor reframed parts of healthcare access around online consultation, triage, pharmacy, and insurance ecosystem links, aiming to reduce friction before offline care.
summary.zh: 平安好医生围绕在线咨询、分诊、药房和保险生态连接重构部分医疗可及性，试图降低线下就医前的摩擦。

sources.label: Ping An Good Doctor public company materials
